logs-unifi.events-* | WHERE `event.category` == "firewall" | STATS count = COUNT(*) BY port = TO_STRING(`destination.port`) | WHERE port IS NOT NULL AND port != "null" | SORT count DESC | LIMIT 15"},"filters":[]}}},"panelIndex":"fw-top-ports","gridData":{"x":24,"y":20,"w":24,"h":14,"i":"fw-top-ports"}},{"type":"lens","embeddableConfig":{"title":"Attack Type Breakdown","attributes":{"visualizationType":"lnsXY","title":"Attack Type Breakdown","references":[],"state":{"datasourceStates":{"textBased":{"layers":{"bh_fw-attack-type":{"index":"fw-events","query":{"esql":"FROM logs-unifi.events-* | WHERE `event.category` == "firewall"
| EVAL attack_type = CASE(
    `network.transport` == "ICMP", "Ping Sweep",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "22",   "SSH Brute Force",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "3389", "RDP Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "23",   "Telnet Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "5900", "VNC Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "443",  "HTTPS Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "80",   "HTTP Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "8443", "Admin HTTPS Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "8080", "HTTP Alt Probe",
    "Other"
  )
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY attack_type | SORT count DESC"},"columns":[{"columnId":"bh_x","fieldName":"attack_type","meta":{"type":"string"},"label":"Attack Type","customLabel":true},{"columnId":"bh_y","fieldName":"count","meta":{"type":"number"},"label":"Events","customLabel":true}]}}}},"internalReferences":[{"type":"index-pattern","id":"fw-events","name":"indexpattern-datasource-layer-bh_fw-attack-type"}],"visualization":{"preferredSeriesType":"bar_horizontal","legend":{"isVisible":false,"position":"right","legendSize":"auto"},"layers":[{"layerId":"bh_fw-attack-type","accessors":["bh_y"],"layerType":"data","seriesType":"bar_horizontal","xAccessor":"bh_x"}]},"adHocDataViews":{"fw-events":{"id":"fw-events","title":"logs-unifi.events-*","name":"logs-unifi.events-*","sourceFilters":[],"fieldFormats":{},"runtimeFieldMap":{},"fieldAttrs":{},"allowNoIndex":false,"allowHidden":false,"type":"esql"}},"query":{"esql":"FROM logs-unifi.events-* | WHERE `event.category` == "firewall"
| EVAL attack_type = CASE(
    `network.transport` == "ICMP", "Ping Sweep",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "22",   "SSH Brute Force",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "3389", "RDP Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "23",   "Telnet Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "5900", "VNC Scan",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "443",  "HTTPS Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "80",   "HTTP Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "8443", "Admin HTTPS Probe",
    TO_STRING(`destination.port`) == "8080", "HTTP Alt Probe",
    "Other"
  )
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY attack_type | SORT count DESC"},"filters":[]}}},"panelIndex":"fw-attack-type","gridData":{"x":0,"y":34,"w":24,"h":12,"i":"fw-attack-type"}},{"type":"lens","embeddableConfig":{"title":"Firewall Policy Rules by Zone","attributes":{"visualizationType":"lnsXY","title":"Firewall Policy Rules by Zone","references":[],"state":{"datasourceStates":{"textBased":{"layers":{"bh_fw-policy-summary":{"index":"fw-policy","query":{"esql":"FROM logs-unifi.firewall_policy-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 5 MINUTES | STATS count = COUNT(*) BY action = `unifi.firewall_policy.action.type`, zone = `unifi.firewall_policy.source.zone_name` | EVAL zone_action = CONCAT(action, ": ", zone) | SORT count DESC | LIMIT 20"},"columns":[{"columnId":"bh_x","fieldName":"zone_action","meta":{"type":"string"},"label":"Zone → Action","customLabel":true},{"columnId":"bh_y","fieldName":"count","meta":{"type":"number"},"label":"Rules","customLabel":true}]}}}},"internalReferences":[{"type":"index-pattern","id":"fw-policy","name":"indexpattern-datasource-layer-bh_fw-policy-summary"}],"visualization":{"preferredSeriesType":"bar_horizontal","legend":{"isVisible":false,"position":"right","legendSize":"auto"},"layers":[{"layerId":"bh_fw-policy-summary","accessors":["bh_y"],"layerType":"data","seriesType":"bar_horizontal","xAccessor":"bh_x"}]},"adHocDataViews":{"fw-policy":{"id":"fw-policy","title":"logs-unifi.firewall_policy-*","name":"logs-unifi.firewall_policy-*","sourceFilters":[],"fieldFormats":{},"runtimeFieldMap":{},"fieldAttrs":{},"allowNoIndex":false,"allowHidden":false,"type":"esql"}},"query":{"esql":"FROM logs-unifi.firewall_policy-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 5 MINUTES | STATS count = COUNT(*) BY action = `unifi.firewall_policy.action.type`, zone = `unifi.firewall_policy.source.zone_name` | EVAL zone_action = CONCAT(action, ": ", zone) | SORT count DESC | LIMIT 20"},"filters":[]}}},"panelIndex":"fw-policy-summary","gridData":{"x":24,"y":34,"w":24,"h":12,"i":"fw-policy-summary"}},{"type":"visualization","gridData":{"x":0,"y":44,"w":48,"h":56,"i":"fw-zone-policy"},"panelIndex":"fw-zone-policy","embeddableConfig":{"title":"Firewall Zone Policy Matrix","savedVis":{"title":"Firewall Zone Policy Matrix","type":"vega","params":{"spec":"{"$schema":"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega/v5.json","background":"#1a1f2e","padding":{"top":0,"left":0,"right":0,"bottom":0},"autosize":"none","signals":[{"name":"width"},{"name":"height"},{"name":"matrixTop","value":10},{"name":"matrixH","value":320},{"name":"labelSz","value":40},{"name":"cellPad","value":4},{"name":"nZones","value":6},{"name":"zones","value":["External","Internal","Gateway","Vpn","Dmz","Hotspot"]},{"name":"cellSz","update":"floor((matrixH - labelSz - 20) / nZones)"},{"name":"matrixW","update":"nZones * cellSz + labelSz + 60"},{"name":"matrixLeft","update":"floor((width - matrixW) / 2)"},{"name":"selectedCell","value":null,"on":[{"events":{"markname":"dataCell","type":"click"},"update":"selectedCell && selectedCell.src === datum.src && selectedCell.dst === datum.dst ? null : {src: datum.src, dst: datum.dst}"},{"events":{"markname":"allPoliciesBtn","type":"click"},"update":"null"}]},{"name":"openGroups","value":[],"on":[{"events":{"markname":"hdrBg","type":"click"},"update":"indexof(openGroups, datum.nameDisplay) >= 0 ? filter(openGroups, function(g){ return g !== datum.nameDisplay; }) : openGroups == null ? [datum.nameDisplay] : openGroups.concat([datum.nameDisplay])"}]},{"name":"H","value":32},{"name":"D","value":26},{"name":"CH","value":30},{"name":"tableTop","update":"matrixTop + matrixH + 10"},{"name":"totalPolicies","update":"length(data('policies'))"}],"data":[{"name":"policies","url":{"%type%":"esql","query":"FROM logs-unifi.firewall_policy-* | WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 5 MINUTES AND `unifi.firewall_policy.enabled` == true | STATS cnt = COUNT(*) BY name = `unifi.firewall_policy.name`, action = `unifi.firewall_policy.action.type`, src = `unifi.firewall_policy.source.zone_name`, dst = `unifi.firewall_policy.destination.zone_name`, origin = `unifi.firewall_policy.origin` | SORT action ASC, name ASC | LIMIT 300"},"transform":[{"type":"formula","as":"nameDisplay","expr":"datum.name === '' || datum.name === null ? '(user-defined)' : datum.name"}]},{"name":"matrix","source":"policies","transform":[{"type":"formula","as":"is_allow","expr":"datum.action === 'ALLOW' ? 1 : 0"},{"type":"formula","as":"is_block","expr":"datum.action === 'BLOCK' ? 1 : 0"},{"type":"aggregate","groupby":["src","dst"],"ops":["sum","sum","count"],"fields":["is_allow","is_block","cnt"],"as":["allow_cnt","block_cnt","total_cnt"]},{"type":"formula","as":"state","expr":"datum.allow_cnt > 0 && datum.block_cnt > 0 ? 'mixed' : datum.allow_cnt > 0 ? 'allow' : 'block'"},{"type":"formula","as":"fill","expr":"datum.allow_cnt > 0 && datum.block_cnt > 0 ? '#0d3035' : datum.allow_cnt > 0 ? '#1a4d35' : '#4d1a1a'"},{"type":"formula","as":"label","expr":"datum.allow_cnt > 0 && datum.block_cnt > 0 ? 'Allow Return (' + (datum.allow_cnt + datum.block_cnt) + ')' : datum.allow_cnt > 0 ? 'Allow All (' + datum.allow_cnt + ')' : 'Block All'"},{"type":"formula","as":"labelColor","expr":"datum.allow_cnt > 0 && datum.block_cnt > 0 ? '#00acc1' : datum.allow_cnt > 0 ? '#2eb886' : '#e0434c'"},{"type":"formula","as":"isSelected","expr":"selectedCell && selectedCell.src === datum.src && selectedCell.dst === datum.dst"}]},{"name":"filtered","source":"policies","transform":[{"type":"filter","expr":"selectedCell != null && datum.src === selectedCell.src && datum.dst === selectedCell.dst"},{"type":"collect","sort":{"field":["action","nameDisplay"]}},{"type":"window","ops":["row_number"],"as":["rowNum"]}]},{"name":"groups","source":"policies","transform":[{"type":"aggregate","groupby":["nameDisplay","action"],"ops":["count"],"as":["numPairs"]},{"type":"collect","sort":{"field":["action","nameDisplay"],"order":["descending","ascending"]}},{"type":"window","ops":["row_number"],"as":["gIdx"]},{"type":"formula","as":"isExpanded","expr":"indexof(openGroups, datum.nameDisplay) >= 0"},{"type":"formula","as":"expandedRows","expr":"datum.isExpanded ? datum.numPairs : 0"},{"type":"window","sort":{"field":"gIdx","order":"ascending"},"ops":["sum"],"fields":["expandedRows"],"as":["cumExpanded"],"frame":[null,-1]},{"type":"formula","as":"yTop","expr":"tableTop + CH + (datum.gIdx - 1) * H + (datum.cumExpanded || 0) * D"},{"type":"formula","as":"actionColor","expr":"datum.action === 'ALLOW' ? '#2eb886' : '#e0434c'"},{"type":"formula","as":"actionBg","expr":"datum.action === 'ALLOW' ? '#0d2e1f' : '#2e0d0d'"},{"type":"formula","as":"chevron","expr":"datum.isExpanded ?
